message:
fix(server): correct shutdown test phase assertions to match expected wait targets

Two test cases in shutdown.rs were calling wait_for_phase(ForceClosing)
but then asserting the phase was ForceClosing/Stopped respectively.
Since the tests spawn tasks that call mark_stopped(), the signal can
race past ForceClosing to Stopped before the assertion runs. Fix both
tests to wait_for_phase(Stopped), which is the actual terminal phase
the tests intend to observe, eliminating the race between the spawned
task's mark_stopped() and the assertion check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
